name: Elmer's White Liquid School Glue, 1 Gallon, Safe, Washable, 1 Count, - #1 Teacher Brand, Bulk Arts & Crafts, Projects, Classroom Supplies, Great for Making Slime
bullets: Make slime and bond materials like paper, wood, fabric and ceramics
Safe, washable and non-toxic - ideal for children
No-run formula is adjustable before setting and dries clear
Great for arts, crafts and school projects
Smooth, classic white glue formula is perfect for making slime at home or in the classroom!
description: Attach items to paper, wood, cloth, pottery, and more with the non-toxic adhesive of Elmer's Washable School Glue. Specially formulated to be washable and easy to use, Elmer's School Glue perfect for school projects and home arts and crafts. Elmer’s School Glue is adjustable before setting and does not run, delivering reliable results with every use. You can also use your liquid glue to create glue slime!

reviews.name: Tracy
reviews.title: Perfect do crafts, projects, all “school” gluing needs
reviews.body: I was shocked that the price for 2 gallons was cheaper than a 3 pack at some places. It has come in handy to have six a large size for multiple crafts. Most recently making my own paper mache clay. Has the traditional texture stickiness and feel of traditional Elmer’s. Great thickness and quality. The containers are sturdy and the lid seals well. Haven’t had any issues with leakage or spillage.…

reviews.name: Soph
reviews.title: Great Value
reviews.body: Same great glue as always 👍. Bought for a summer camp and the larger refill bottle lasts for a good time.

reviews.name: Ashley
reviews.title: Glue
reviews.body: Perfect for slime! This last a long time and the kids can make so many things of slime or use for art projects!

reviews.name: Kristina G.
reviews.title: So much cheaper than the small bottles!
reviews.body: My daughter makes a lot of slime and this was perfect! It is lasting longer than I expected. The price is great too!
